features: Construction Set Sensory Bin for Ages 3+ Kids: This all-in-one sand set invites kids to explore, build, and imagine! Packed with sensory play sand, construction toys, castle molds, and glow-in-the-dark rocks, it’s perfect for creative, hands-on fun both indoors and outside.

Glow-in-the-Dark Rock Magic Sand Set: Add a thrilling twist to Play period with glow-in-the-dark rocks! Kids can create glowing pathways and exciting designs as they build in their construction site. These unique rocks bring creativity and bring extra fun to every play session.

Mess-Free, Easy-to-Mold Sand Construction Toys: Our sensory sand is designed to cling together, making it easy for kids to mold and shape without the mess! Low in dust, this sand offers clean sensory play and is perfect for molding, and excavating activities.

Promotes Fine Motor & Sensory Skills: Boost your preschooler’s development with a kit that fosters sensory exploration, creativity, and fine motor skills. Kids can dump, and build, creating their own work zone and engaging in sensory-rich activities.
